summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this shard is not a dedupe cluster. All listed refs are open pull requests with hydrated state, and no close, merge, fix, or security route action is safe or allowed from this evidence.

actions.reason: Maintainer-owned draft PR with proof and waiting-author status should remain open independently.
Maintainer-owned draft PR with proof and waiting-author status should remain open independently.
Substantive contributor PR with supplied proof and passing checks should remain open independently for normal maintainer review.
Open contributor PR has a focused scope but failed real-behavior proof; keep it open independently rather than close or escalate the whole shard.
